textByHashes.3f15491fdefce26852567e3fcb3160c7b4d57e88: Oh! Hello, surface-dweller. Do you think you could help me?
textByHashes.52c8a0555efa6f7a6d4a73f90b57352968165412: This power station keeps breaking. I can fix it easily with parts from the old power generator on the other side of the cavern, but that's not easy to get to.
textByHashes.2627ae5bfa80e1a68b989dd42912315e13a79deb: Do you think you could get something from there for me?
textByHashes.b6833281f6a96204d9c099f0e00d06c2fa9031c9: Excellent! Now, at the moment, I need a and a . If you could get either one I'd appreciate it.
textByHashes.65c4ec855403ea7528a54e7cbb278dff7d2b0b15: Alright, I'm sure someone else will help me.
textByHashes.177f240fdafb855939ecd26f3844ba4c882c4662: Oh, this is, um, the power station. It converts heat from the lava into magical energy, which powers the lights in the city.
textByHashes.ee42aba0af1c5b217513fa02861955ea45370547: The lava heats water into steam, which drives a turbine around. The turbine contains magical stones.
textByHashes.7720e5135fb8f1be337cd6d4381911e216292283: As the magical stones rotate they generate a magical current in the conductor cables, and that powers the light!
textByHashes.3e2c0dc35baa57e24557704f866e8afd416a342f: We're hardly going to let flowing lava inside the city, are we?
textByHashes.8de6a2b4a6ca5c0768bcf957afff097857e4f3f1: But don't worry, it's quite safe. The creatures on the cavern floor can't get up here.
textByHashes.8c5f1c61e2b1856a19954846a9c3ce360b7eae3a: Oh...they deliver power from the old power station.
textByHashes.1e9270b96d6af31b8d26b9f362384e1725dcad16: There was an accident with that power station and it stopped working, so we set this one up instead.
textByHashes.27495fabbe598106dbb5e9ded95441dfd42a6d6a: Oh, look at that broken part. Let me take it off you.
textByHashes.ef3661fd2ce60b93659997134c83674a7f86967f: Oh, look at those broken parts. Let me take them off you.
textByHashes.50b07e1ed662b7404f772b62e38dfc8299663e19: Oh? How did you get across the cavern?
textByHashes.1a4ef0fbc212c136ab414c730ee9461c59d56fd2: Oh, well, I'll give you a few tips about how to do that more easily.
textByHashes.91f080f80cc54b8d13bfa4404772d17bf8b8d455: I always need more help. This power station is always breaking.
textByHashes.897342d138534129f43c2af429c21873e331b6bc: At the moment, I need a and a . If you could get either one I'd appreciate it.
textByHashes.9645d2427b07dab9e06975b5103b7216ef61e628: Thanks, but I've got plenty of those. At the moment I need a item and a item.
